bird.name: 棕尾褐鶲
bird.summary: 棕尾褐鶲（学名：Muscicapa ferruginea）又名红尾鹟，为鶲科鶲属的鸟类。 紅尾鶲 （Muscicapa ferruginea） 是鶲科的一種鳥類。

locations.name: Purvanchal Range
locations.summary: The Purvanchal Range, or the Eastern Highlands, refers to the northern portion of the Indo-Burman Ranges.

locations.name: 海南省
locations.summary: 海南省，简称琼，是中华人民共和国唯一全境位于热带的省份，省会位于海口市。海南省是一个以海洋为主体的岛屿省份，亦是中华人民共和国总面积和海洋面积最大的省份。全省户籍总人口约1048.31万人，不过每年冬季会有大量候鸟型流动人口（進出约972…

relations.subject: 棕尾褐鶲
relations.evidence: It is native to the eastern Himalayas, the Purvanchal Range and central/southern China ; it winters to Hainan and Southeast Asia

relations.subject: 棕尾褐鶲
relations.evidence: It is native to the eastern Himalayas, the Purvanchal Range and central/southern China ; it winters to Hainan and Southeast Asia

relations.subject: 棕尾褐鶲
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
